objections.response: I can only use published Aqaar KB prices. This value is unknown when not published, and the sales team should confirm it.
ROI and yield are not published in the v3 KB. I can capture your investment goal and hand it to sales for confirmation.
Payment plan is shown only when published in the v3 KB; otherwise it remains unknown.
Use only v3 KB location, district, community, and brochure distance facts where present.
Availability status must be read from v3 inventory and confirmed by sales at handoff.
